# Zapply Jobs — Canada Internships 2027

> Curated internship and co-op listings for students across Canada. Updated hourly. Canada-focused.

## What this repo provides
- 200+ internship and co-op listings updated hourly
- Jobs from Canadian employers across multiple ATS platforms
- Structured data: title, company, location, apply URL, domain tags
- Enriched data: required skills, visa sponsorship, summary
- Canada-focused internships and co-ops for students
